fixture: 053_transaction_control

statement 1:
  sql:
    BEGIN
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 0A000] at 1:1 (offset 0): transaction-control SQL is not supported here; use DB.Begin / Tx.Commit / Tx.Rollback

statement 2:
  sql:
    COMMIT
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 0A000] at 1:1 (offset 0): transaction-control SQL is not supported here; use DB.Begin / Tx.Commit / Tx.Rollback

statement 3:
  sql:
    ROLLBACK
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 0A000] at 1:1 (offset 0): transaction-control SQL is not supported here; use DB.Begin / Tx.Commit / Tx.Rollback

statement 4:
  sql:
    BEGIN WORK
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 0A000] at 1:1 (offset 0): transaction-control SQL is not supported here; use DB.Begin / Tx.Commit / Tx.Rollback

statement 5:
  sql:
    COMMIT WORK
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 0A000] at 1:1 (offset 0): transaction-control SQL is not supported here; use DB.Begin / Tx.Commit / Tx.Rollback
